title: Amscan 9913037 Union Jack Paper Napkins Pack of 16 Great Britain Tableware Red White and Blue Royal Family Coronation Olympics National Theme 33cm x 33cm
features: Our Red, White & Blue range has everything you need for a Coronation street party!
description: Disposable tableware is a party essential; they are perfect for party food and buffets. Use sturdy paper tableware for no more washing up! Alternatively, if you do purchase the plastic ranges, please wash and re-use. Ideal for all occasions, we have tablecloths, napkins, plates, cups, cutlery and more. Available in a range of colours, prints, designs, and characters you are sure to find the tableware to match your party theme.
